title: MapleStory: Idle RPG June 11 Patch Notes
author: Grendel
summary: The June 11 update added Hero's Journey, Guild Raid Horntail, chapters 39-41, Growth Dungeon stages, Hero Power Stage 8, costume search, summer events, new guild seasons, movement improvements, and a broad set of fixes.

sections.title: Hero's Journey
items: Unlocks after clearing the Chapter 20 Boss; Journey Tokens begin dropping from Auto Hunt in Chapter 21.
Journey Chest Keys recharge five per week up to a maximum of five, and one free Blessing reset is available each day.
Journey Trail uses Journey Tokens and Mesos to unlock cleared boss footprints, permanent Inventory Effects, and Special Options.

sections.title: Guild Raid: Horntail
items: Parties support up to eight members from the same guild, and each member must have cleared Normal Horntail Boss Raid.
The raid ranks guilds across all servers in the same region and awards damage-based rewards.
Defeating Horntail awards the Horntail Expedition medal with a Final Damage +3% Inventory Effect.

sections.title: Summer event schedule
items: Ruler of the Beach, Summer Treasure Hunt, Treasure Exchange, and Water Balloon Collection run from June 11 into July 2026.
Summer 10-Day Attendance ends July 1, while the main summer events end July 22 and the Summer Shop purchase period ends July 24.
Arena Boost and new Guild War and Guild Training Ground seasons were added on separate schedules.

notes: Original MPStorys summary and structured facts verified against the official Nexon Forum patch note on 2026-07-18.
changes: Added Hero's Journey with Journey Chests, Journey's Blessing, and Journey Trail.
Added Guild Raid Horntail for up to eight members of the same guild.
Added chapters 39, 40, and 41 and expanded Growth Dungeon progression.
Added Hero Power Stage 8, which unlocks the seventh Ability slot.
Added an All tab and name search to Costumes.
Added Ruler of the Beach and multiple summer treasure, attendance, shop, and boost events.
Added new Guild War and Guild Training Ground seasons.
Improved responsiveness for manual movement and jumping.
resolved_issues: Fixed several Party Quest repeat, matching, result, and exploration-timer issues.
Fixed equipment preset rename and Exploration Star Force display issues.
Fixed multiple companion skill interactions for Marksman, Shadower, and Dark Knight.
Fixed several Horntail Curse, Breath, attack-delay, and battle behavior issues.
Fixed a movement joystick issue triggered by Area Chat speech bubbles.
Improved force-closing behavior on low-memory devices and during Party Quest repeats.
